title: APEX Active Docs And Infra Bounded Decomposition Plan
objective: Convert the classified remaining APEX-root docs and infrastructure assets into a tranche-based bounded decomposition plan with exact target homes, archive outcomes, and follow-on execution packets for the unified platform repo.
constrained_outputs: A bounded decomposition plan and movement manifest under Platform-Authority and ops/agents/handoffs
No wholesale file moves and no silent promotion of transitional schema lineage
Explicit follow-on execution packet recommendations only
validation_steps: Confirm the remaining APEX-root docs and infra surface is decomposed by bounded slice rather than folder-level migration
Confirm every recommended tranche has an exact future target home or archive outcome
Confirm PM/project lineage, automation/orchestration assets, and ETT knowledge-schema assets remain separated
Confirm the packet does not perform physical moves or change active runtime/database authority
sql_permission_note: This packet is a decomposition-planning packet only. It does not authorize file moves, SQL changes, or runtime implementation work.
